arch_source: Project memory 'Triton sm_120 — Z3 OPTIMIZED' + sibling fused_hca_attention.py (num_stages=1, num_warps=8, no TMA on consumer Blackwell)
design: One program = one (b, s); all H heads share the on-the-fly gather of C_sel (top_idx depends only on b,s). All contractions via tl.dot (Q@C^T [H,T], P@C [H,D]). Online flash softmax over tk with the per-head sink seeded as the initial running max (avoids -inf NaN; replaces HCA early-query guard). Backward: dq/dsink local, dC scatter via tl.atomic_add over top_idx.

correctness.fused_vs_fp32_truth: 7.98e-3 .. 8.02e-3 (MORE accurate than the bf16 eager reference at 1.88e-2..2.23e-2)
correctness.doubling_footgun_check: norm_ratio 0.9994..0.9996 (NOT ~2.0/~4.0) — empirically confirms NO interior-axis 3D-reduce miscompile; kernel uses tl.dot for all contractions so the footgun pattern is absent by construction

memory.eliminated_tensors: C_sel [B,S,tk,D] (2048 MiB at B32/S8192) + scores/weights [B,H,S,tk] (768 MiB) and their autograd-saved copies — never materialized

gather_and_io_in_bounds.statement: forall b,s,h,t,d with top_idx in [0,NB): C-gather, q/out/lse/idx/dC linear offsets all in-bounds

intra_tile_dC_offsets_distinct_for_disti.statement: within one program, topk gives distinct block ids per query row so i*D+d ranges never self-alias; cross-program collisions handled by atomic_add

sm120_tiling_valid.statement: BLOCK_H=16,BLOCK_D=32,BLOCK_T=64 all pow2>=16 for tl.dot; num_stages=1 (no TMA)

not_verified: ncu hardware-counter profiling (occupancy, bank conflicts, achieved bandwidth) — not run; speedup is wall-clock only
multi-layer / full-model integration (attention.py not modified per instruction — user integrates after pass)
GQA interplay / n_skip_rope MAC-suffix path in the CSA branch (those live outside the fused sub-computation)
tk > 128 or D != 32 configs (BLOCK_T capped at 64; larger tk just adds loop iters, untested for perf)
